text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, my skin's still red... I don't think that
moisturizer is good for me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I shouldn't have bought it just because of the
packaging...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I know I should choose products based on my skin
type, but still...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I wish they sold a cream that works for me and looks cute...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Dober seems to be having skin troubles...
